goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 14:45' and should depart from 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'postcode', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 14:45 and should depart from stevenage
The train should leave on thursday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment
Make sure you get entrance fee, postcode, and address
